create.title: Create New Token Draft
create.decimalsError: Enter a whole number between 0 and 18.
create.stablecoinDecimalsHelper: Stablecoin defaults to 6 decimals, but you can choose any value from 0 to 18.
create.customDecimalsHelper: Custom tokens default to 9 decimals. Choose any value from 0 to 18.
create.tokenizedSecurityDecimalsHelper: Tokenized Security defaults to 8 decimals, but you can choose any value from 0 to 18.
create.mainSignerHint: This wallet will be used as the token's main signer for deploy and later token actions.
create.noControlledWallets: No controlled wallets are available yet. The token will use the current default signer.
create.transferControlsHint: Choose how this token should treat approved or blocked destination addresses.
create.draftCreated: Draft created. Deploy it on-chain from the token page.
create.configureDraft: Configure the draft now, then deploy it on-chain from the token page.
create.chooseTemplate: Choose a template to create a draft first, then deploy it on-chain.
create.stablecoinTemplateDescription: Create a regulatory-compliant stablecoin with transfer restrictions.
create.tokenizedSecurityTemplateDescription: Create a compliant security token with scaled UI amounts and core controls.
create.customTemplateDescription: Build your own token with full control over extensions and parameters.
create.denylistDescription: Listed destinations are blocked before they can receive controlled actions.
create.allowlistDescription: Only approved destinations can receive controlled token actions.
create.disabledDescription: This token will not use a transfer control list.
create.stablecoinAllowlistNote: Use when transfers must stay inside a known set of wallets.
create.securityDenylistNote: Use when the token should remain open except for blocked wallets.
create.customAllowlistNote: Enable this when the token needs restricted transfer access.

activity.title: Audit history
activity.description: Every management action recorded for this asset.

permissions.externalWarningBody: SDP can't sign for authorities held outside custody, so related actions stay unavailable until they're transferred to an SDP custody wallet.
permissions.externalRemediationTarget: Transfer these authorities to your SDP custody wallet:
permissions.externalRemediationNoWallet: Create an SDP custody wallet, then transfer these authorities to it.
permissions.externalRemediationNote: The current authority holder must sign the transfer from their own wallet — SDP can't perform it.

workspace.pausedHint: Minting, burning, and administrative transfer actions are disabled until the token is unpaused.
workspace.deployHint: This will deploy the token onchain so operations can run.
workspace.noTokensMatch: No tokens match your current search.
workspace.viewToggleLabel: Switch between grid and list view

management.tokenAmountDescription: Token units (e.g. 1 or 1.5). Will be converted to raw units using this token's decimals.

management.denylistDescription: Manage the blocked destination addresses for this token.

management.denylistFreezeHint: Need to restrict a wallet before it has a token account? Add it to the denylist first.
management.defaultAccountStateHelper: Default state for newly created token accounts.
management.templateHelper: Base template applied to this token.

forms.name: Name
forms.sourcePlaceholder: Signer wallet or its token account
forms.forceBurnDescription: Administrative forced burn from source account.

forms.enterWalletAddress: Enter the wallet address. SDP will derive the associated token account for this mint automatically.
forms.walletAddressPlaceholder: Wallet address that holds this token

forms.controlListDescription: Manage the approved destination addresses for this token.

authority.noneWalletWarning: Choosing None will clear this authority. You will confirm that change before it is submitted.
authority.noneDescription: This authority will be cleared if you save this change.
authority.controlledWalletHint: Controlled wallets are the recommended authority targets.
authority.solanaAddressOrNone: Solana address or leave empty to set to None
authority.enterAddressOrNone: Enter a valid Solana address or leave this blank to set the authority to None.
authority.noWalletsHint: No controlled wallets are available yet. Enter an address manually or leave it blank to set the authority to None.
authority.noneFieldWarning: Setting this field to None will clear the authority. You will confirm that change before it is submitted.
authority.mintNoneDescription: This will clear the mint authority for the token.
authority.mintNoneImpact: No wallet will be able to mint additional supply after this change.
authority.freezeNoneDescription: This will clear the freeze authority for the token.
authority.freezeNoneImpact: Token accounts can no longer be frozen or unfrozen after this change.
authority.delegateNoneTitle: Set Permanent Delegate Authority to None?
authority.delegateNoneDescription: This will clear the permanent delegate authority for the token.
authority.delegateNoneImpact: Administrative delegated transfer and burn actions will no longer be available after this change.
authority.metadataNoneDescription: This will clear the metadata authority for the token.
authority.metadataNoneImpact: Metadata updates will no longer be available through this authority after this change.

summary.privateDescription: Details you provide are private and only used to configure your asset.

classificationRail.title: How this works
classificationRail.assetProfileDescription: You select the category and type. SDP stores your canonical issuance metadata.
classificationRail.issuanceMetadataDescription: Includes asset, compliance, chain, and custom (customer/integration) fields.
classificationRail.publicProjectionDescription: SDP projects a safe public subset to token metadata.
classificationRail.tokenMetadataUriDescription: SDP hosts the default URI that returns only the public metadata.
classificationRail.privateDescription: Compliance and custom metadata stay private unless explicitly included in the public metadata projection.

assetProfileForm.fixHighlightedFields: Fix the highlighted fields before saving.

templates.stablecoinHelper: Best for fiat-pegged assets with transfer controls and admin freeze support.
templates.tokenizedSecurityHelper: Designed for regulated instruments where participant controls are mandatory.
templates.customHelper: Start from a blank profile and tune issuance settings for advanced requirements.

overview.title: Token Overview
overview.readyForDeployDescription: This asset is ready to deploy — continue in the Operations tab.
overview.noDescription: No description yet — add one in the Details tab.
overview.authoritiesIncompleteTooltip: Not all authorities are SDP-managed, so some actions can't be signed from the dashboard.

operations.deployHelper: Deploy this token on-chain before running other fund operations.

taxonomy.stablecoinDescription: Assets designed to maintain a stable value, typically backed by fiat or other liquid assets.
taxonomy.fiatBackedDescription: Backed 1:1 by fiat currency reserves held in regulated financial institutions.
taxonomy.cryptoBackedDescription: Collateralized by crypto assets held in custody to maintain the peg.
taxonomy.tokenizedSecurityDescription: Regulated financial instruments or digital representations of securities.
taxonomy.equityDescription: Tokenized shares or equity-like interests in a company.
taxonomy.debtDescription: Bonds, notes, or other debt instruments.
taxonomy.fundDescription: Fund interests or exchange-traded fund shares.
taxonomy.genericDescription: Other tokenized assets that don't fit the above categories.
taxonomy.commoditiesDescription: Claims on physical commodities or natural resources.

config.advancedCapacitiesDescription: Recommended capacities are pre-selected based on the asset profile.
config.financialDetailsDescription: Key financial attributes of the asset.
config.collateralOracleDetailsDescription: On-chain collateral backing this token and the price feed used to value it.
config.reserveAssetPlaceholderCrypto: e.g., SOL, wBTC, ETH, staked SOL
config.reserveCustodianPlaceholderCrypto: e.g., On-chain vault or program address
config.collateralizationRatioHelp: Target collateral value relative to tokens issued, as a percent.
config.minCollateralRatioHelp: Lowest collateral ratio a position can reach before it's liquidated, as a percent.
config.redemptionHelp: Holders can redeem tokens for the underlying reserves.
config.votingRightsHelp: Holders of this class carry voting rights.
config.categoryAssetDetailsDescription: What backs or represents this asset.
config.underlyingAssetPlaceholderCollectible: e.g., Trading cards, fine art, watches
config.kycDescription: Require identity verification before an investor can hold or transfer this asset.
config.kycDescriptionExpert: Require identity verification before a wallet can hold or transfer tokens.
config.restrictTradingHoursDescription: Allow transfers only on set days and during set hours.
config.restrictTradingHoursDescriptionExpert: Limit token transfers to specific days and time windows.
config.freezeTransfersDescription: Freeze tokens in response to compliance events or investigations.
config.issueRetireControlsDescription: Control who can issue new units or retire existing ones.
config.issueRetireControlsDescriptionExpert: Control who can mint new tokens or burn existing supply.
config.redemptionApprovalsDescription: Require approval before an investor can redeem their holdings.
config.redemptionApprovalsDescriptionExpert: Require approval before tokens are redeemed for reserves.
config.investorReportingDescription: Share periodic holdings and activity reports with investors.
config.transferApprovalsDescription: Require approval before a transfer can go through.

transferApprovals.approversHint: Wallet addresses or role names. These can be added after launch.

redemptionApprovals.approversHint: Wallet addresses or role names. These can be added after launch.

investorReporting.recipientsHint: Email addresses or investor groups. These can be added after launch.

config.permanentDelegateDescription: Allow a controlling authority to seize or claw back tokens in response to compliance events.
config.transferFeeDescription: Withhold a percentage fee on every token transfer.
config.interestBearingDescription: Accrue interest on token balances at a fixed rate.
config.interestBearingRateHint: Annual rate in basis points: 100 bp = 1%.
config.scaledUiAmountDescription: Adjust displayed balances by a set factor, e.g. for stock splits or share-class changes.
config.nonTransferableDescription: Prevent tokens from being transferred once held.
config.transferHookDescription: Route transfers through a rules program you provide for additional checks.
config.quickFillHint: Pick a setup to pre-fill the controls below — adjust anything after.
config.accessPolicyPrompt: Choose who can hold and transfer this token.
config.accessPolicyAllowlistEffect: Only approved wallets can receive or hold this token.
config.accessPolicyBlocklistEffect: Anyone can hold except wallets you block.
config.accessPolicyDisabledEffect: Anyone can hold and transfer this token freely.
config.accessPolicyTechnical: Allowlist freezes new accounts at deploy and is permanent once launched. Block and off are enforcement policy only.
config.settingsPermanentSubtitle: Set when the token is created — cannot change after launch.
config.settingsPermanentLockedSubtitle: Deployed on-chain — these extensions are permanent and can no longer be changed.
config.settingsOngoingSubtitle: Each policy can be adjusted or configured at any time.
config.settingsOngoingSubtitleDraft: A starting set. Each policy is configured later on the compliance tab, and can be changed anytime.
config.settingConfigureInExpert: Switch to Expert view to configure its options.
config.comboCustomSelection: You've customized the individual settings — open Detailed to review them. No preset matches this exact mix.
config.comboConflictReasonBalanceDisplay: a token can apply only one balance-display rule.
config.comboConflictReasonNonTransferableFee: a non-transferable token is never transferred, so a transfer fee would never apply.
config.comboConflictReasonNonTransferableHook: a non-transferable token is never transferred, so custom transfer rules would never run.
config.comboRegulatedStablecoinDescription: A public fiat-backed coin, open to all but sanctioned wallets: a blocklist, KYC, controlled supply, redemption review, and reserve reporting.
config.comboPermissionedStablecoinDescription: A closed-network coin for approved institutions only: an on-chain allowlist, KYC, controlled supply, and transfer review.
config.comboRegulatedSecurityDescription: The compliance base for a tokenized equity or bond: verified investors, reviewed transfers, market-hours trading, and ongoing reporting.
config.comboFundOperationsDescription: Add subscriptions and redemptions with issuer-managed supply — combine with a regulated security to run a fund.
config.comboVerifiedHoldersDescription: Only approved wallets can hold or transfer this asset — verified holders (KYC) plus an on-chain allowlist.
config.comboControlledAssetDescription: Issuer keeps compliance control — freeze accounts and reclaim tokens — limited to verified holders.
config.comboLoyaltyRewardsDescription: Non-transferable points or rewards, with issuer-controlled minting.
config.comboYieldNoteDescription: An interest-accruing instrument for verified holders, with controlled supply.
config.comboRevenueShareDescription: Captures a small fee on every transfer, with controlled supply.
config.comboGatedAccessDescription: Permissioned token: new accounts start frozen until you approve them, limited to verified holders and set trading hours.

compliance.accessPolicyDescription: Documents the intended access policy for this asset.
compliance.lockReason: Locked after deployment — on-chain enforcement can't be changed.
compliance.appliedOnDeploy: Applied on-chain when the token deploys.
compliance.controlsDescription: On-chain actions for this token — these take effect immediately.

classification.title: What is this asset?
classification.description: Start by telling us what this asset represents and how it should be classified.
classification.name: Name
classification.namePlaceholder: e.g., USD Workshop Money Market Fund
classification.nameHint: A clear name to identify this asset.

review.assetDescription: The asset and how it will be represented.
review.name: Name
review.complianceAccessDescription: How the asset will be controlled and who can interact with it.
review.allowlistHint: Only approved addresses can hold or transfer.
review.blocklistHint: Blocked addresses cannot hold or transfer.
review.investorReportingHint: Activity reports available for investors and stakeholders.
review.publicInformationDescription: The safe information that will be visible to anyone.

publicInfo.name: Name
publicInfo.publicTokenInfoHelp: This is how your asset will appear to wallets, explorers, and the public.
publicInfo.notIncludedHelp: These fields stay private unless you choose to include them.

assetDetails.title: Asset details
assetDetails.description: Add the key information about this asset. You can update these details any time.
assetDetails.aboutDescription: Basic information that describes what this asset is.
assetDetails.logoHint: Shown next to your token in wallets and explorers.
assetDetails.documentsDescription: Important documents and references related to this asset.
assetDetails.accessControlDescription: Choose how this token treats approved or blocked destination addresses.
assetDetails.learnLists: Learn how allow and block lists differ
assetDetails.optionalSignerHint: Optional — leave unselected to use the project's default signer.
assetDetails.customFieldsDescription: Add your own private fields, stored under custom.customer.
assetDetails.signingWalletLockReason: Set at creation — individual operations can use a different signer.
assetDetails.deployConfigAuthorityNote: Authorities (mint, freeze, delegate) are assigned at deploy from your signing wallet's custody.

assetProfileDetails.privateByDefault: This information is private by default and won't be visible to the public unless you choose to include it.
